data.name: Riverwood
data.detailed_description:
Riverwood is an adult-only visual-novel style rpg deck building game where you play as different adventurers, do numerous quests, and battle various enemies!

The game’s story is told through a visual novel style structure, packed with character art and homoerotic storylines that pull you straight into a world of domination, spunk, and erotic tension. You’ll meet a full cast of muscular men, from rugged orcs and bandits to cocky twunks and alphas. Each enemy has their own intense personalities and ways of asserting control. Whether you’re defiant or obedient, the story lets you experience what happens if you let yourself sink into their control.

Every battle is built around respect for your preferences, not just visually, but as part of the gameplay and hurdles you have to overcome through strategy. Your battles are a personalised experience where your desires become an enemy you have to survive through.

The deck building system is strategically complex and gives your brain just enough stimulation. You'll build and upgrade your deck as you face off against different enemies, while utilizing synergies to survive longer and better. Experiment with combos, upgrade your tactics, and let the blood flow through you!

data.short_description: Riverwood is an adult-only visual-novel style rpg deck building game where you play as different adventurers, do numerous quests, and battle various enemies!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-6300 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 520 / AMD Radeon R7 240 / NVIDIA GeForce GT 730 (DirectX 11 compatible)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound device
  • VR 支援: No VR support
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 / AMD Radeon RX 560 or better (DirectX 11 compatible)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound device
  • VR 支援: No VR support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-6300 or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD Graphics 520 / AMD Radeon R7 240 / NVIDIA GeForce GT 730 (DirectX 11 compatible)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound device
  • VR Support: No VR support

Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600 or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 / AMD Radeon RX 560 or better (DirectX 11 compatible)
  • DirectX: Version 11

  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound device
